extensions.name: Google Gemini (Antigravity)
extensions.description: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash via the Antigravity language server. Auth rides your existing ~/.gemini login.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.tagline: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash via the Antigravity language server
extensions.longDescription: Run Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash models locally through the Antigravity language server. Agent provider with tool-loop support. Authentication uses your existing ~/.gemini OAuth login - no API key required. Tracks per-model quota and account credits so you can avoid rate limits.
highlights: Gemini 3.5 Flash (High / Medium / Low) via the local Antigravity language server
Agent provider with tool-loop and meta-agent mode
Account credits and per-model quota surfaced in the settings panel
Auth rides your existing Antigravity / ~/.gemini login - no key entered in Nimbalyst

extensions.name: Nimbalyst Mindmap
extensions.description: A freeform spatial mindmap editor with AI-assisted editing
extensions.author: Unknown
extensions.tagline: Freeform spatial mindmap editor with AI-assisted editing
extensions.longDescription: Create hierarchical mind maps on an infinite canvas. Add nodes, color-code branches, attach notes and tags, and use the AI to generate entire mind maps from a topic.
highlights: Infinite canvas with keyboard-driven node creation
Color-coded branches, notes, tags, and status per node
AI generates complete mind maps from a topic description

extensions.name: Nimbalyst Slides
extensions.description: Presentation editor with live reveal.js preview
extensions.author: Unknown
extensions.tagline: Presentation editor with live reveal.js preview
extensions.longDescription: Create slide decks in markdown with a split-view editor. Write your content on the left, see the live reveal.js presentation on the right. Supports 12 themes, transitions, speaker notes, and fragments.
highlights: Split-view markdown editor with live reveal.js preview
12 built-in themes including moon, dracula, and solarized
AI creates entire presentations from a topic or outline

extensions.name: Astro
extensions.description: Visually edit Astro website pages inline — changes write back to YAML data files
extensions.author: Unknown
extensions.tagline: Visual editor for Astro website pages
extensions.longDescription: Open .astro files and see the rendered page from your dev server. Edit text directly on the page -- changes write back to the underlying YAML data files automatically.
highlights: Live visual editing of rendered Astro pages via iframe
Inline text editing that writes back to YAML data files
AI tools to list and refresh editable content

extensions.name: Automations
extensions.description: Schedule recurring AI-powered tasks with file-based automation definitions
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

extensions.name: CSV Spreadsheet
extensions.description: Edit CSV files with a spreadsheet interface and formula support
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

screenshots.alt: CSV spreadsheet editor with revenue data

extensions.tagline: Visual CSV editing with formulas and column formatting
extensions.longDescription: Open CSV and TSV files in a full spreadsheet interface with formula support, column resizing, frozen rows/columns, and sortable headers. Edit data visually while the underlying CSV stays clean and git-friendly. Toggle to source mode to see and edit the raw text.
highlights: Spreadsheet UI for CSV and TSV files
Formula support with cell references
Frozen rows and columns, sortable headers
Source mode toggle for raw CSV editing

extensions.name: DatamodelLM
extensions.description: AI-assisted data modeling with visual entity-relationship diagrams
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

screenshots.alt: Visual entity-relationship diagram with User, Post, Comment, Tag, and Category models

extensions.tagline: Visual database schema design with Prisma syntax
extensions.longDescription: Design database schemas visually as entity-relationship diagrams backed by real Prisma syntax. Drag entities around the canvas, define fields and relations, and switch to source mode to edit the Prisma schema directly. The AI can generate schemas from descriptions or modify existing ones.
highlights: Visual ERD canvas backed by real Prisma schema files
AI generates and modifies database schemas from descriptions
Embed data models inline in markdown documents
Bidirectional editing between visual and source modes

extensions.name: Developer Tools
extensions.description: Advanced git operations and developer workflows
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

extensions.name: Excalidraw
extensions.description: Excalidraw diagram editor with AI-assisted editing
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

screenshots.alt: Architecture diagram with client, API server, cache, and database

extensions.tagline: Hand-drawn style diagrams with AI-assisted editing
extensions.longDescription: Create architecture diagrams, flowcharts, wireframes, and freeform sketches using the Excalidraw canvas. The AI can create and modify diagrams from natural language descriptions, import Mermaid syntax, and lay out complex systems visually. Switch between the visual canvas and source mode for direct JSON editing.
highlights: AI creates and modifies diagrams from natural language
Import Mermaid diagrams and convert to visual elements
Bidirectional editing with source mode toggle
Full Excalidraw toolset: shapes, arrows, text, frames, grouping

extensions.name: Git
extensions.description: Git log viewer with push, pull, and rebase support
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

screenshots.alt: Git log panel showing commit history with diffs and branch management

extensions.tagline: Visual git log with push, pull, and branch management
extensions.longDescription: Browse your commit history in a visual log panel, inspect diffs, push and pull changes, and manage branches. Integrates into the bottom panel with a keyboard shortcut for quick access.
highlights: Visual commit history with diff inspection
Push, pull, and rebase from the panel
Branch management and switching
Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+Shift+G) for quick access

extensions.name: Image Generation
extensions.description: AI-powered image generation with support for sketches, diagrams, and illustrations
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

screenshots.alt: Image generation project with AI-generated sketches and style options

extensions.tagline: Generate images from text prompts with multiple style options
extensions.longDescription: Create sketches, diagrams, illustrations, and other images by describing what you want. Manage multiple generations in a project file, compare variations, and iterate on prompts. Configurable style presets and generation settings.
highlights: Generate images from natural language prompts
Multiple style presets: sketch, diagram, illustration
Project files to organize and compare generations
AI tool integration for generating images during conversations

extensions.name: iOS Development Tools
extensions.description: Tools for iOS development including XcodeGen, simulator management, and deployment
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

extensions.name: Nimbalyst Mindmap
extensions.description: A freeform spatial mindmap editor with AI-assisted editing
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.tagline: Freeform spatial mindmap editor with AI-assisted editing
extensions.longDescription: Create hierarchical mind maps on an infinite canvas. Add nodes, color-code branches, attach notes and tags, and use the AI to generate entire mind maps from a topic.
highlights: Infinite canvas with keyboard-driven node creation
Color-coded branches, notes, tags, and status per node
AI generates complete mind maps from a topic description

extensions.name: MockupLM
extensions.description: Visual UX mockup creation with HTML/CSS for planning and design
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

screenshots.alt: Team dashboard mockup with stats cards and deployment table

extensions.tagline: AI-generated UI mockups rendered as live HTML/CSS
extensions.longDescription: Design UI mockups by describing what you want in natural language. The AI generates complete HTML/CSS mockups that render as live previews in the editor. Iterate on designs visually or switch to source mode to hand-edit the HTML. Great for planning features, communicating designs, and rapid prototyping.
highlights: AI generates complete HTML/CSS mockups from descriptions
Live rendered preview of your designs
Source mode for hand-editing HTML and CSS
Rapid iteration on UI concepts without design tools

extensions.name: Namenym
extensions.description: AI-powered brand naming tool for Nimbalyst
extensions.author: Unknown
extensions.tagline: AI-powered brand naming and domain brainstorming
extensions.longDescription: Generate creative brand names by combining concepts, synonyms, and mashups. Evaluate candidates with scoring, check domain availability across TLDs, and shortlist your favorites.
highlights: AI generates concepts, synonyms, and creative mashup names
Scoring and evaluation for memorability and pronounceability
Domain availability checking across multiple TLDs

extensions.name: PDF Viewer
extensions.description: View PDF files directly in Nimbalyst
extensions.author: Nimbalyst Team

screenshots.alt: PDF document viewer showing a multi-page document with page navigation

extensions.tagline: View PDF documents directly in the editor
extensions.longDescription: Open and read PDF files without leaving Nimbalyst. Renders PDF pages with full fidelity, supporting multi-page documents, zoom, and page navigation.
highlights: View PDF files inline without switching apps
Multi-page navigation and zoom
Keeps your workspace context while reading documents

extensions.name: Planning
extensions.description: Structured planning and tracking with YAML frontmatter
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

extensions.name: Playwright
extensions.description: Test runner, trace viewer, and screenshot automation for Playwright
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

extensions.name: SQLite Browser
extensions.description: Browse and query SQLite databases with AI assistance
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

screenshots.alt: SQLite database browser showing tables, schema, and query results

extensions.tagline: Browse and query SQLite databases with AI assistance
extensions.longDescription: Open any SQLite database file and browse tables, run queries, and explore data visually. The AI can write SQL queries, analyze table structures, and help you understand your data. Supports .db, .sqlite, .sqlite3, and .db3 files.
highlights: Visual table browser with data preview
AI writes and explains SQL queries
Schema introspection and table analysis
Works with .db, .sqlite, .sqlite3, and .db3 files

extensions.name: 3D Object Editor
extensions.description: Design and edit 3D objects (OBJ/STL files) in a 3D space with AI assistance
extensions.author: Unknown
extensions.tagline: Design and edit 3D objects with AI assistance
extensions.longDescription: Open and edit OBJ and STL files in a full 3D viewport. Add primitives, transform objects, and use AI tools to build 3D scenes programmatically.
highlights: Full 3D viewport with orbit controls and grid
Add primitives (box, sphere, cylinder, cone, torus, plane)
Six AI tools for programmatic 3D scene building
